allow:
Bash(for pr in 45 46 47 48 49 50 51 52; do
  echo "=========================================="
  echo "PR #$pr: $(gh pr view $pr --json title --jq '.title')"
  echo "State: $(gh pr view $pr --json state --jq '.state')"
  gh pr view $pr --json headRefName,mergeable,statusCheckRollup --jq '"Branch: \(.headRefName) | Mergeable: \(.mergeable) | Checks: \(.statusCheckRollup[0].status // "none")"'
  echo ""
done)

Bash(for pr in 45 46 47 48 49 50 51 52; do
  blocking=$(gh api repos/matthewhand/open-swarm/pulls/$pr/reviews 2>/dev/null | jq -r '.[].body' 2>/dev/null | grep -i "critical\|blocking\|must\|required\|stop_sign" || true)
  if [ -n "$blocking" ]; then
    echo "BLOCKING: PR #$pr"
  else
    echo "OK: PR #$pr"
  fi
done)
